programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Alabama Shakes - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Mixing classic R&B vocals with a soulful blues-rock base, Alabama Shakes have taken garage rock and turned it on its head. Alabama Shakes takes the Austin City Limits stage for the second time in support of their newest album Sound & Color.

programme.title: One Direction - Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: One Direction performs a stellar set at the 2015 edition of the Apple Music Festival. Be prepared to sing along to their catchy chart-topping hits!

programme.title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success.

programme.title: Paul Simon - Live in New York City
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Uprising Live !
programme.desc: This live show from Dortmund's Westfalenhalle was filmed on June 13th 1980, featuring Bob Marley on superb form. Marley's energetic, charismatic performance includes I Shot The Sheriff, Get Up, Stand Up and No Woman, No Cry and the film has been subs...

programme.title: J Balvin - Bruuttal
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled BRUUTTAL. A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, Energía.

programme.title: Chic: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Heart - Live At The Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: This film captures not only Heart's first-ever live performance at the Royal Albert Hall but is also the first concert film of Heart performing with a full orchestra.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson, mother of slain Soledad Brother George Jackson, is interviewed by producer- Ellis Haizlip. Other show features include the exciting Latin-jazz sounds of seven man combo.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: This program traces the roots of Black protest in America by means of passages from Frederick Douglass' greatest orations, dramatized by Arthur Bufghardt, interspersed with performances by drummer Max Roach.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Author James Baldwin is interviewed by the young Black poetess Nikki Giovanni in a special two-part presentation of Soul!, taped in London.

programme.title: The Bob Ross Experience
programme.desc: Witness the incredible transformation of Bob Ross's original studio into an intimate museum experience designed for those he inspired.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The first snowfall just beyond autumn signals the true beginning of winter -- join Bob Ross as he discovers just such a glorious moment.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grandest of mountains overlooking an incredibly breathtaking waterfall … a Bob Ross painting you must see to believe!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hidden far from the highways of the South are lovely wetlands teaming with moss-clad trees and birds; Bob Ross shares a rare glimpse of beauty!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A wilderness path leads you to the side of a still lake in a setting that Bob Ross accents with an abundance of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Under the most glorious of skies, enjoy the rhythmic flow of deep sea waters crashing and splashing upon the surrounding rocks and cliffs - Bob Ross style!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The trees have shed their snow and ice has begun to thaw, Spring will arrive soon in the incredibly beautiful Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross deep into the swamp and breathe in the fragrances of damp earth and moss-filled trees on a rill bank.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this brilliant southwestern scene, Bob Ross portrays a unique view of nature with clear blue skies, dry mountains, and a graceful river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With his trusty brushes, Bob Ross takes us to a beautiful lake hideaway nested below a towering mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mysterious night sky is pierced by amazing lunar rays which Bob Ross uses to illuminate a mighty mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Fantastic faux woodgrain! Hike into the wilderness with Bob Ross and discover a well-worn path leading back to his favorite fishing spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow along with the brushes of Bob Ross and step into a beautiful mountain oval - experience the first signs of autumn.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Misty background evergreens and cheerful blue sky give Bob Ross the perfect setting for this lovely birch tree painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Explore the backwoods with Bob Ross and happen upon an old, forgotten shanty hidden away in the densest of undergrowth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross and experience the quiet motionless beauty of a glassy river as the morning fog hangs onto the distant shore.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross transforms a zany looking canvas into a gorgeous, soft wooded scene with radiant sun glowing over opulent trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross's icy-blue mountains, evergreens, and lacy-like bush clusters capture the mood of a cold snowy day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: What a delicate view of polar beauty; Bob Ross taps his brushes to make subtle hills, sleeping grasses, and leafless trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the warmth of the day in that quiet spot beside the rippling stream and gentle breezes - Bob Ross creates a painting so vibrant and real.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow Bob Ross into a lovely mountain setting with magnificent evergreens, where the first touches of snow appear in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Paint along with Steve Ross as he creates a lovely oval painting, a winter landscape surrounding a frozen lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: An advanced $900 million planetary explorer designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal intricate details undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Eye of the Beholder

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Painted By Light
programme.desc: When the universe formed, all of space blazed white-hot, but it didn't last. Darkness reined for 200 million years before the light was reborn.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: For most of human history, the night sky seemed two-dimensional. To our ancestors, this perspective gave no hint to the universe's true depth.
